name: Hawaiian Jerky
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean meat, thinly sliced (3/16-1/4 in thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except meat in a small glass bowl and stir to mix well.
2. Place the thinly sliced meat 3-4 layers deep in a container, spooning the mixture over each layer.
3. Cover tightly and marinate for 6-12 hours in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally and keeping the mixture covered.
4. Lay out the meat on trays and dehydrate for 24 to 36 hours. Use pineapple chunks with juice in the marinade if desired, then dehydrate with the meat.
